raw.message: Bored? We've got some teas for you ;)

hook.summary: A character in a swimsuit performs a photoshoot with camera flashes.
hook.visual_action: A female character strikes poses in a studio while a silhouette photographer takes photos.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Okay, work that pose. Beautiful. Now switch it up, get a little strange with it.

scene_flow: Character strikes a standard pose in a photo studio.
Character transitions into a series of increasingly awkward and strange poses.
Camera flashes illuminate the character during the shoot.
Final screen shows a group of characters and the game title 'Episode REALITY STARS'.
audience_proxy: Young women interested in fashion, modeling, and interactive drama games.
